messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a python-pptx script that builds a 6-slide minimalist presentation for Content Writers on Email Marketing Best Practices. Use clean layouts with generous padding and simple lists. Output the file as "Email_Best_Practices.pptx". All content must be written in English using a 16:9 Widescreen layout. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_COLOR = "#2C3E50"
ACCENT_COLOR = "#3498DB"
LIGHT_BG = "#F8F9FA"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
MUTED_TEXT = "#7F8C8D"
SUCCESS_GREEN = "#27AE60"

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=LIGHT_BG):
    bg_fill = slide.background.fill
    bg_fill.solid()
    bg_fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, x, y, w, h, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color="#2C3E50", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, w, h)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, w, h, title_text="", body_text="", bg_color=WHITE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(230, 230, 230)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.12)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.12)

    if title_text:
        p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_t = p_title.add_run()
        run_t.text = title_text
        run_t.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_t.font.bold = True
        run_t.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_COLOR)
        run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body_text:
        p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
        p_body.space_before = Pt(4)
        run_b = p_body.add_run()
        run_b.text = body_text
        run_b.font.size = Pt(10.5)
        run_b.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MUTED_TEXT)
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, label_text):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, Inches(4), Inches(0.35))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = label_text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    bar_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.38), Inches(0.6), Pt(2))
    bar_shape.fill.solid()
    bar_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)
    bar_shape.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, text="Email Marketing Best Practices | Content Writers Guide"):
    footer_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.15), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.35))
    footer_bar.fill.solid()
    footer_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_COLOR)
    footer_bar.line.fill.background()

    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(7.18), Inches(12), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, w, h):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, w, h)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(240, 240, 240)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y + h / 2 - Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Image Placeholder"
        run.font.size = Pt(9)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MUTED_TEXT)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10.33), Inches(1.2), "Email Marketing Best Practices", font_size=40, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(2.33), Pt(3))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.0), Inches(3.6), Inches(7.33), Inches(0.5), "A Practical Guide for Content Writers", font_size=18, color=MUTED_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_02_importance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "Why Email Matters")

    stats = [
        ("4.3B", "Email Users Worldwide"),
        ("122%", "Average ROI on Email"),
        ("80%", "Prefer Brand Emails Over Social"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.6)
    card_height = Inches(2.5)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_width - 2 * gap) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(1.8)

    for i, (number, desc) in enumerate(stats):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, title_text=number, body_text=desc, bg_color=WHITE)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_03_subject_lines(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "Subject Line Strategies")

    # Left side - main tip box
    main_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.2), Inches(4.5))
    main_box.fill.solid()
    main_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_COLOR)
    main_box.line.fill.background()

    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.0), Inches(1.6), Inches(4.8), Inches(1.2))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Keep It Under 50 Characters"
    run.font.size = Pt(22)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    txBox2 = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(4.8), Inches(2.5))
    tf2 = txBox2.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "Short subject lines perform better on mobile devices and are more likely to be fully visible in inbox previews."
    run2.font.size = Pt(13)
    run2.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 210, 220)
    run2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    # Right side - three strategy cards
    strategies = [
        ("Personalize", "Use the recipient's name and segment by behavior"),
        ("Create Urgency", "Words like 'today' or 'limited' boost opens"),
        ("Spark Curiosity", "Tease value without giving everything away"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.0)
    card_h = Inches(1.2)
    gap_v = Inches(0.3)
    start_y = Inches(1.4)

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(strategies):
        y = start_y + i * (card_h + gap_v)
        add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), y, card_w, card_h, title_text=title, body_text=body)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_04_content_structure(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "Content Structure")

    steps = [
        ("Header", "Clear sender name and recognizable subject line"),
        ("Body", "Concise message with scannable paragraphs and bullet points"),
        ("CTA", "Single clear call-to-action button or link"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.2)
    card_h = Inches(1.6)
    gap_v = Inches(0.4)
    start_y = Inches(1.5)
    x_pos = (SLIDE_WIDTH - card_w) / 2

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(steps):
        y = start_y + i * (card_h + gap_v)

        # Vertical accent line on left
        if i < len(steps) - 1:
            line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x_pos + Inches(0.3), y + card_h, Pt(2), gap_v)
            line_shape.fill.solid()
            line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)

        add_card(slide, x_pos, y, card_w, card_h, title_text=title, body_text=body)

    # Step numbers as circles
    for i in range(len(steps)):
        y = start_y + i * (card_h + gap_v)
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x_pos - Inches(0.5), y + card_h / 2 - Inches(0.18), Inches(0.36), Inches(0.36))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)
        circle.line.fill.background()

        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x_pos - Inches(0.45), y + card_h / 2 - Inches(0.18), Inches(0.36), Inches(0.36))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = str(i + 1)
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
        run.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_05_design_tips(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "Design & Formatting Tips")

    tips = [
        ("Whitespace", "Use generous spacing between sections for readability"),
        ("Font Size", "Body text should be 14-16pt minimum"),
        ("Mobile First", "Over 60% of emails are opened on mobile devices"),
        ("Clear CTA", "One primary action per email with contrasting button color"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.3)
    gap_x = Inches(0.4)
    gap_y = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_w - gap_x) / 2

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(tips):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap_x)
        y = Inches(1.4) + row * (card_h + gap_y)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, title_text=title, body_text=body)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_06_optimization(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "Testing & Optimization")

    # Left side - bullet lists
    ab_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(5.4), Inches(3.0))
    ab_box.fill.solid()
    ab_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    ab_box.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(230, 230, 230)
    ab_box.line.width = Pt(1)

    txBox_ab = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.9), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.0), Inches(2.6))
    tf_ab = txBox_ab.text_frame
    tf_ab.word_wrap = True
    p_title = tf_ab.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_title.add_run()
    run_t.text = "A/B Testing Tips"
    run_t.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_COLOR)

    bullets_ab = [
        "Test one variable at a time (subject line, send time, CTA)",
        "Run tests for at least 24-48 hours",
        "Use statistically significant sample sizes",
        "Document results and apply learnings to future campaigns",
    ]

    for bullet in bullets_ab:
        p = tf_ab.add_paragraph()
        run_b = p.add_run()
        run_b.text = f"• {bullet}"
        run_b.font.size = Pt(10.5)
        run_b.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MUTED_TEXT)
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    metrics_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.5), Inches(5.4), Inches(2.3))
    metrics_box.fill.solid()
    metrics_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    metrics_box.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(230, 230, 230)
    metrics_box.line.width = Pt(1)

    txBox_m = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.9), Inches(4.7), Inches(5.0), Inches(1.9))
    tf_m = txBox_m.text_frame
    tf_m.word_wrap = True
    p_title2 = tf_m.paragraphs[0]
    run_t2 = p_title2.add_run()
    run_t2.text = "Key Metrics to Track"
    run_t2.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_t2.font.bold = True
    run_t2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_COLOR)

    bullets_m = [
        "Open Rate — measure subject line effectiveness",
        "Click-Through Rate (CTR) — gauge content engagement",
        "Conversion Rate — track goal completions per email",
        "Unsubscribe Rate — monitor audience satisfaction",
    ]

    for bullet in bullets_m:
        p = tf_m.add_paragraph()
        run_b2 = p.add_run()
        run_b2.text = f"• {bullet}"
        run_b2.font.size = Pt(10.5)
        run_b2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MUTED_TEXT)
        run_b2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    # Right side - bar chart
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Industry Avg", "Personalized", "Triggered"]
    chart_data.add_series("Open Rate (%)", (21, 26, 35))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(6.4), Inches(1.2), Inches(6.0), Inches(5.6),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 80

    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)

    value_labels = series.data_labels
    value_labels.show_value = True
    value_labels.font.size = Pt(11)
    value_labels.font.bold = True
    value_labels.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_COLOR)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.name = FONT_BODY

    val_axis = chart.value_axis
    val_axis.has_title = False
    val_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(9)

    add_footer(slide)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_importance(prs)
    slide_03_subject_lines(prs)
    slide_04_content_structure(prs)
    slide_05_design_tips(prs)
    slide_06_optimization(prs)

    prs.save("Email_Best_Practices.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
